positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a celestial fox curled up with its tail forming a crescent moon, surrounded by delicate constellations and wisps of etheric smoke. The color palette is deep indigo, midnight blue, muted gold, and ethereal pearl white. Use thick, clean linework with negative space emphasis. Composition should be centralized and symmetrical. Art style: Modern woodcut meets Japanese linocut print, high contrast, graphic novel quality. Lighting should appear mystical and diffused, highlighting the silhouette of the fox and moon. Suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Print-friendly, isolated on solid background.
negative: blur, noise, grainy, text, watermark, logo, trademark, grainy, low resolution, worst quality, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, artifacts, smudges, signature, messy
